title: Mizoram University

Upcoming Workshops and Seminars Take part in our upcoming events that encourage learning and connection at Mizoram University. Everybody’s welcome—students, faculty, and visitors alike! Join us to share ideas and grow. March 26 - 27, 2026 International Seminar on “From Dialogue to Development: Communication, Culture and SDGs,” About: International Seminar on “From Dialogue to Development: Communication, Culture and SDGs,” Learn More 1 – 2 April, 2026 International Seminar on Contemporary Psychosocial Issues: Integrating Research and Practice About: The International Seminar on Contemporary Psychosocial Issues: Integrating Research and Practice is conceived as an academic and professional platform to examine the complex psychosocial challenges emerging in a rapidly changing world. Accelerated social, economic, technological, and environmental transformations have significantly influenced human behaviour, social relationships, and psychological well-being, contributing to increasing levels of stress, emotional distress, and mental health concerns across diverse populations. Learn More 10 – 12 March, 2026 Three Day International Seminar on Border Management: Traditional and Non-Traditional Security Challenges About: Border management has historically been viewed through the narrow lens of territorial defense i.e., guarding a line on a map against enemy armies. However, in the 21st century, the concept has undergone a paradigm shift. Modern border management is no longer just about “guarding” but about “policing” and “regulating.” It involves a complex system aimed at facilitating legitimate trade and movement while filtering out security threats. Learn More 29 – 30 April, 2026 International Conference on Literature and Culture in the Digital Age About: The digital age has transformed how literature and culture are produced, circulated, and experienced. Though literary forms have continually evolved, the core power of literature—the emotion, insight, and truth carried through language—endures, even as it reaches audiences through diverse, technologically mediated channels. Learn More Watch us on YouTube Mizoram University About: Mizoram University 20th Convocation, at Mizoram University 2026 Load More...
